title.ko: 연소 엔진의 시동; 그러한 엔진에 대한 시동 보조제, 달리 제공되지 않는 것
title.en: STARTING OF COMBUSTION ENGINES; STARTING AIDS FOR SUCH ENGINES, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR

definition.ko: 강제력에 의한 시동 F02N1/00, F02N3/00, F02N5/00 그밖의 시동 기계적 에너지의 축적부를 가진 것 F02N5/00 유체 원동기에 의한 것; 전동기에 의한 것 F02N7/00; 11/00 작동실 내에서 직접 작동하는 것; 유체압력에 의한 것; 폭약에 의한 것 F02N9/00; 13/00 기타 장치에 의한 것, 세부, 부속품 F02N15/00 시동을 위한 기타 수단 또는 보조 F02N19/00; 99/00

title.ko: 핸드(hand) 크랭크를 가지는 시동장치(중간 동력 축적부를 가지는 것 F02N 5/00 ～ F02N 15/00)
title.en: Muscle-operated starting apparatus

title.ko: 핸드(hand) 크랭크를 가지는 시동장치(중간 동력 축적부를 가지는 것 F02N 5/00 ～ F02N 15/00)
title.en: Starting apparatus having hand cranks (with intermediate power storage F02N0005000000-F02N0015000000)
having safety means preventing damage caused by reverse rotation

title.ko: 기타 강제조작하는 시동장치(중간 동력 축적부를 가지는 것 F02N 5/00 ～ F02N 15/00)
title.en: Other muscle-operated starting apparatus (with intermediate power storage F02N0005000000-F02N0015000000)
having pull-cords
having foot-actuated levers
Power-operated starting apparatus; Muscle-operated starting apparatus with intermediate power storage
Starting apparatus having mechanical power storage
of spring type
of inertia type

title.ko: 유체구동 보조기관 또는 장치를 가지는 시동장치
title.en: Starting apparatus having fluid-driven auxiliary engines or apparatus
the apparatus being of single-stroke piston type, e.g. pistons acting on racks or pull-cords
the pistons acting on screw-threaded members to effect rotation
the engines being of reciprocating-piston type (of internal-combustion type F02N0007100000)
the engines being of rotary type

title.ko: 보조기관 또는 연소식의 장치를 사용하는 것을 특징으로 하는 것(폭약 약포(explosive cartridges)를 사용하는 것 F02N 13/00)
title.en: characterised by using auxiliary engines or apparatus of combustion type (by using explosive cartridges F02N0013000000)
the engines being of rotary type, e.g. turbines (F02N0007140000 takes precedence)
the starting engines being readily removable from main engines, e.g. of portable type

title.ko: 보조 압력유체의 동작실로 공급에 의한 기관의 시동
title.en: Starting of engines by supplying auxiliary pressure fluid to their working chambers

title.ko: 연소에 의해 직접 만들어 낼 수 있는 압력 유체(폭약 약포를 사용하는 것에 의한 것 F02N 13/00)
title.en: the pressure fluid being generated directly by combustion (by using explosive cartridges F02N0013000000)
the pressure fluid being generated otherwise, e.g. by compressing air
Starting of engines by means of electric motors
the motors having longitudinally-shiftable rotors
the motors being associated with current generators
and with ignition apparatus
Circuits specially adapted for starting of engines
Safety devices (F02N0011080000 takes precedence)
Starting of engines by means of mobile, e.g. portable, starting sets

title.ko: 외부에 의해 전류가 공급되는 전동식 시동기에 의한 기관 시동(F02N 11/12가 우선)
title.en: Starting of engines by means of electric starters with external current supply (F02N0011120000 takes precedence)
Starting of engines, or driving of starting apparatus by use of explosives, e.g. stored in cartridges
Cartridges specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 타의 동력 조작 시동장치; 구조 요소부품, 세부 또는 부속품이고 그룹 5/00에서 13/00으로 분류되지 않은 것 또는 그들의 그룹에는 없는 점을 주목하여야 할 것
title.en: Other power-operated starting apparatus; Component parts, details, or accessories, not provided for in, or of interest apart from, groups F02N0005000000-F02N0013000000
Gearing between starting-engines and started engines; Engagement or disengagement thereof
the gearing including disengaging toothed gears
the toothed gears being moved by axial displacement
the gearing being of friction type
Safety devices not otherwise provided for
Starting aids for combustion engines, not otherwise provided for
Aiding engine start by thermal means, e.g. using lighted wicks
by heating of fluids used in engines
by heating of combustion-air by flame generating means, e.g. flame glow-plugs
Arrangement thereof
by heating of engine coolants
Subject matter not provided for in the other groups of this subclass
